name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America is a nationally accredited lender offering payday loans ($100–$500), installment loans up to $1,000, and title loans up to $25,000 online or in-store.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized and fully accredited consumer lending company serving millions of borrowers across the United States. Their Jacksonville, FL location on North Edgewood Avenue in Commonwealth Village — west of downtown, near I-95 and I-295 — offers both walk-in and online access to short-term loan products. The company maintains a 4.9 out of 5 star customer rating based on over 125,000 reviews, with more than 200,000 reviews on Google, indicating consistent service delivery across its branch network.

This location offers three loan products. Payday Loans range from $100 to $500 and are structured as two-to-four-week short-term loans designed to bridge gaps between paychecks. Installment Loans range from $100 to $1,000 and allow repayment across multiple payments over time — a more flexible structure than the standard payday product. Title Loans, offered in partnership with LoanCenter, range from $2,000 to $25,000 and use a borrower's paid-off vehicle as collateral, with the loan amount based on the vehicle's appraised value. The store also provides Western Union money transfer services. Applications can be submitted in-store, online, or by phone for pre-qualification.

Advance America distinguishes itself operationally through bilingual service — staff speak Spanish, explicitly noted as 'Hablamos español' — making it accessible to Jacksonville's Spanish-speaking population. Borrowers can apply through multiple channels: walk-in, online, or pre-qualify by phone at (904) 781-7075. The store operates extended weekday hours (Monday–Thursday 10am–6pm, Friday 9am–6pm) and Saturday hours (9am–4pm), though it is closed Sundays. A referral rewards program allows existing customers to earn rewards for each new borrower they refer who originates a loan.

Advance America is a viable option for borrowers who need same-day cash and have limited access to traditional credit. That said, payday loans carry APRs that are among the highest in consumer finance — even at $500 — and rolling over these loans can create a cycle of debt that costs far more than the original amount borrowed. Title loans carry a distinct risk: defaulting can result in losing the vehicle used as collateral. Borrowers who can qualify for a credit union payday alternative loan (PAL), a personal loan from a bank, or an employer payroll advance should compare those options before applying here. Advance America is best treated as a fast, short-term bridge rather than a recurring financial tool.
pros: 4.9/5 star rating from 125,419 verified reviews; 200,000+ Google reviews
Three distinct loan products covering $100 up to $25,000
Same-day funding available on payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Online and in-store application options with phone pre-qualification
Bilingual staff — Spanish spoken at this location
Western Union money transfer services offered in-store
Extended weekday and Saturday hours with no appointment required
cons: Payday loans capped at $500 with very high APRs typical of short-term lenders
Title loans require a fully paid-off vehicle as collateral — default risks vehicle repossession
Title loans are issued through LoanCenter (a third party), not directly by Advance America
Closed Sundays, limiting access on weekends
Payday loan structure (lump-sum repayment) can trap borrowers in rollover cycles
best_for: Borrowers needing $100–$500 fast with no credit check and same-day funding
People who need up to $1,000 and prefer spreading repayment across multiple payments
Vehicle owners who need $2,000–$25,000 and have a paid-off car to use as collateral
Spanish-speaking borrowers in west Jacksonville seeking bilingual lending assistance
diagnosis: Advance America is best for borrowers who need fast cash between paychecks or a short-term installment loan and have exhausted lower-cost options. The main caveat: payday loan APRs are extremely high, and title loans put your vehicle at risk — these products should be used sparingly and repaid on schedule to avoid compounding costs.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
